info.title: Archive Suite API Contract
info.description: Framework-neutral API contract for the Laravel API and Next.js migration. The current Node server is the reference implementation until Laravel reaches parity.

post.summary: Authenticate a user
Rotate the HttpOnly refresh cookie and issue a new access token
Revoke the current session

get.summary: Read a single record by id

post.summary: Bulk upsert records for migration and sync compatibility
Bulk delete records by id with per-item results

get.summary: List files in the active file store
Download or stream a file through the API

put.summary: Upload or replace a file by key

get.summary: Fetch a rights record by archive item id

post.summary: Create or upsert a rights record

get.summary: Return rights enforcement status for an item

post.summary: Queue a media processing workflow
Upload a file and create an archive record

201.description: File uploaded and archive record created

post.summary: Create a public visual review link for media

get.summary: Read a public visual review link
List active participants in a collaboration room

post.summary: Send a collaboration presence heartbeat

get.summary: List active resource locks in a collaboration room

post.summary: Acquire or refresh a resource lock
Release a resource lock held by the current user

get.summary: Get the shared document draft for a room resource

post.summary: Update the shared document draft with optimistic versioning

get.summary: Preview an allowlisted ODBC core table

post.summary: Insert one row into an allowlisted ODBC core table

patch.summary: Update a row in an allowlisted ODBC core table

delete.summary: Delete a row from an allowlisted ODBC core table

post.summary: Create a scoped public share link
Scan ingest directory and create archive records
Pull files from FTP source and create archive records
Pull files from SMB source and create archive records

get.summary: List users and pending invitations (admin only)

post.summary: Invite a new user (admin only)

201.description: Invitation created; the one-time token is only returned here

delete.summary: Delete a user (admin only; self-deletion is rejected)

post.summary: Accept an invitation token and create the invited user account

patch.summary: Update the runtime-mutable subset of security settings (admin only)

post.summary: Create a backup of all record stores now (admin only)
Preview per-store record counts of a backup without restoring (admin only)
Restore record stores from a named backup (admin only)

Set-Cookie.description: HttpOnly refresh cookie when cookie auth is enabled

token.description: One-time invitation token; only returned at creation time

cspPolicy.description: Deploy-time only; read-only in the API

corsOrigins.description: Deploy-time only; read-only in the API
